name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Black Desert Project in Nevada, United States dated October 2016.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Black Desert Project in Nevada, United States dated October 2016.pdf
document.description: This technical report provides a comprehensive evaluation of the Black Desert Project in Washoe County, Nevada, summarizing its location, geology, and previous exploration efforts while proposing a phased exploration program to assess the potential for a lithium brine deposit.
